name: property management CFOs processing 5–15 expense reports/month tool
description: For property management CFOs processing 5–15 expense reports/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense report compilation instead of manual compilation of expense reports from credit card statements.
target_audience: property management CFOs processing 5–15 expense reports/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate expense reporting leads to cash flow gaps.
features: manual entry of credit card transactions
export to CSV for easy sharing
